{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Finger
|rank=S
|affct=FTH
|birthday=08-26
|source=* FTH Master Scrolls (31.5%), Fragment Crafting (15.1%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Master Scrolls (6.5%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.53%)
* Tap the rock in front of the garage 999 times
* Give [[Mailbox#Peter Jr.|Peter Jr.]] 20 0-star reviews in the same conversation
|description=On Aug 26, 2020 AD, a god gamer fainted from exhaustion.

After 999 taps, the legendary gamer overcame all odds and activated the power of the Golden Finger, launching a successful career in hacking. From then on, no game was ever a challenge. Gaming companies threatened to sue, but to no avail.
|fame=61
|art=54
|fth=100
|civ=64
|tech=53
|ss1=Tadpole Pond upgrade B-tad Cost -1%<br>Fungus Farm upgrade B-tad Cost -1%<br>Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -1%
|ss2=Tadpole Pond upgrade B-tad Cost -2%<br>Fungus Farm upgrade B-tad Cost -2%<br>Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -2% 
|ss3=Tadpole Pond upgrade B-tad Cost -3%<br>Fungus Farm upgrade B-tad Cost -3%<br>Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -3%
|ss4=Tadpole Pond upgrade B-tad Cost -5%<br>Fungus Farm upgrade B-tad Cost -5%<br>Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -5%
|ss5=Tadpole Pond upgrade B-tad Cost -7%<br>Fungus Farm upgrade B-tad Cost -7%<br>Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -7%
|ss6=Tadpole Pond upgrade B-tad Cost -10%<br>Fungus Farm upgrade B-tad Cost -10%<br>Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -10%
|ss7=Tadpole Pond upgrade B-tad Cost -10%<br>Fungus Farm upgrade B-tad Cost -10%<br>Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -10%<br>Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -10% (Awakened)
|skill1={{Skills|yamato|btad drops|15}}
|skill2={{Skills|quarry|stone output|30}}
|skill3={{Skills|lumbercamp|wood output|30}}
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:Tadpole Pond Upgrade Cost Reduction]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Upgrade Cost Reduction]]
[[Category:Time Machine Upgrade Cost Reduction]]
[[Category:Yamato Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Yamato Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration B-tad Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Quarry Skill]]
[[Category:Quarry Output Boost]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Skill]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Output Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:DEF-Fungi Boost]]
[[Category:Realm Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards Crystal of Will]]
[[Category:Chika Boost]]
